overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval harbor town, transitioning from cobblestone streets to wooden docks with sailing ships, NPCs, and guards. The scene features bright midday lighting with clear skies and historic European architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval town street with stone merchant buildings

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through the cobblestone street between historic stone buildings with red-tiled roofs

entered.detail: large stone building with tall arched windows and red roof tiles
wooden wagon with large spoked wheels parked beside the street
irregular cobblestone paving covering the ground surface
piles of wooden cargo crates stacked near the building wall

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a sunlit medieval cobblestone street lined with historic stone buildings featuring red-tiled roofs and arched windows. Wooden merchant carts and stacked crates line the sides of the narrow street as the character moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden harbor dock with fishing shacks

events.description: exits cobblestone street and steps onto wooden harbor dock planks

agents.ego_description: Geralt turning left toward the waterfront and walking onto the wooden dock area

notable_agents.action: NPC sitting on the dock edge facing the water

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the dock walkway over water
small wooden hut with thatched roof and open sides
calm blue water of the harbor reflecting the sky
tall stone tower with red conical roof visible across the water
stacked wooden barrels and cargo containers

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from cobblestone to wooden dock planks as Geralt enters the harbor area. Fishing shacks with thatched roofs line the right side while the harbor water opens up to the left. A distant castle tower with a red roof is visible across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: open harbor pier with moored sailing vessels

events.description: character stops at dock end to view large red galleon passing by

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the dock observing the harbor, stopping briefly to watch a large red galleon sail past

notable_agents.action: shirtless NPC sitting on dock edge with feet dangling over water
NPC working on wooden planks near the water's edge

entered.detail: small wooden boat with furled sail moored to the dock
large merchant vessel with red and yellow hull and white sails passing through the harbor

segments.scene_description: Geralt explores the open harbor pier with expansive views of the water. A large red galleon with yellow trim sails past while smaller boats are moored nearby. NPCs sit and work along the dock edges as the character reaches the end of the pier to observe the maritime activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: crowded dock walkway with guard patrol

events.description: character turns around and begins walking back along the dock toward town

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking back through the dock area passing guards in red uniforms and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of three guards in red uniforms with halberds walking toward camera
NPC in orange tunic walking past carrying goods

entered.detail: large building with steep thatched roof and red brick walls
covered wooden wagon with canvas canopy parked on the dock

segments.scene_description: Geralt turns and walks back along the dock, now facing opposing pedestrian traffic. Three guards in distinctive red uniforms with halberds walk toward the camera, while other NPCs go about their business. The dock becomes more enclosed with thatched warehouses and wooden carts lining the path back to town.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow medieval street into an expansive harbor area before circling back toward the town. It begins with Geralt walking along a sunlit cobblestone path lined with red-tiled stone buildings and merchant carts. As the terrain shifts from stone to wooden planks, the scene opens up to reveal fishing shacks and a distant castle tower across the water. The view then expands across an open pier where a large red and yellow galleon sails past moored boats and working NPCs. Finally, the camera turns back toward the town, moving through a more enclosed area of thatched warehouses and passing three guards in red uniforms carrying halberds.
